title: lepicephalus corniculatus
intro:
Lepicephalus corniculatus is a plant species, however I couldn't find any information on it. 

However, I can suggest an alternative, Corniculatus is a synonym for the plant species, Lotus corniculatus, or bird's foot trefoil.

Lotus corniculatus, or bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant. 

It is used in herbal medicine for its antiviral, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties. 
The plant is said to have several health benefits, including being used to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. 
The herbal preparations of Lotus corniculatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
